name: Granola
recipeIngredient: 1/2 can to 1 full can thawed frozen apple juice concentrate (12-ounce size)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together in a big bowl: 2 cups rolled oats, 1 cup rolled barley flakes, 1 cup rolled wheat flakes, and 1 cup rolled rye flakes.
2. Thaw out the can of frozen apple juice concentrate and pour it undiluted directly over the grains to moisten. This adds sweetness without using sugar or honey.
3. (Optional) Mix together in a measuring cup: 1/4 cup ground psyllium powder and 1 TBSP cinnamon. Sprinkle this mixture over the moistened grains and mix well.
4. Spread the mixture out on cookie sheets and bake at 350°F. After about 20 minutes, remove the sheets and stir everything to dry out the moisture and lightly toast the grains without burning them. Continue checking and stirring every 15 minutes until completely dry and golden brown. Reduce heat to 300°F after 45 minutes.
5. Remove from oven and let cool on counter. Once cooled, add about a cup of raisins, mix well, and store in a jar. Make this recipe once a week. Ensure it is completely dry to prevent mildew.
